creator: mike@sentex.net
text:
(In reply to Gleb Smirnoff from comment #47)

Thank you for the vote of bug confidence Gleb :)  I will have a look at the 3 instances where this bug seems to have happened and look to see if there is anything in common on what I monitor. On my test box, I will try and load it up with a few extra checks, and especially ones that call external programs to see if I can randomly trigger it on my test machine.
